subject: LIGO/Virgo S191225aq: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
submitter: Deep Chatterjee at University of Wisconsin, Milwaukee  <deep@uwm.edu>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration and the Virgo Collaboration report:

The trigger S191225aq is no longer considered to be a candidate of
interest. The data at the time of the trigger is consistent with
coincident glitches present in the L1 and V1 detectors.
